headline: Verisign (NASDAQ:VRSN) Reports In-Line Q2 Results as Raised 2026 Guidance Supports the Quality Stock Thesis
summary: Verisign’s Q2 2026 results were in line with expectations, with revenue rising 6% YoY. The company raised full-year guidance, reported strong domain growth, and continued aggressive share buybacks, though the stock dipped slightly after hours.

headline: Intel Needs More Than Blowout Earnings as Chips Rally Falters
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Intel Corp. is expected to report strong second-quarter earnings after the market close Thursday, but even blowout results likely won’t be enough to reverse the stock’s July slide. headline: Verisign Announces Delegation of .Web
summary: RESTON, Va., July 23, 2026--VeriSign, Inc. (NASDAQ:VRSN), a global provider of critical internet infrastructure and domain name registry services, today announced that .web has been delegated into the global Domain Name System’s (DNS) root zone, with Verisign as the designated registry operator. The delegation of .web follows the successful resolution of all previous disputes related to the generic top-level domain (gTLD), the details of which are confidential.
